section.title: Skills
section.description: A neural map of engineering strengths across interfaces, platforms, AI systems, infrastructure, and delivery workflows.

skills.name: Frontend Engineering
skills.description: Building responsive, accessible, state-aware interfaces with strong component boundaries and polished interaction details.

skills.name: Backend Engineering
skills.description: Designing reliable service layers, API contracts, validation paths, and integration points that keep product workflows steady.

skills.name: AI Engineering
skills.description: Composing AI-assisted workflows with structured prompts, retrieval-ready data models, evaluation loops, and human-centered UX.

skills.name: Databases
skills.description: Modeling data for clarity, query performance, and maintainability across relational and document-oriented storage patterns.

skills.name: Cloud
skills.description: Deploying web systems with practical cloud primitives, environment isolation, observability hooks, and cost-conscious architecture.

skills.name: DevOps
skills.description: Automating build, test, release, and monitoring loops so teams can ship smaller changes with stronger confidence.

skills.name: System Design
skills.description: Connecting product requirements to durable technical plans through modular boundaries, scaling assumptions, and failure planning.

skills.name: Developer Tools
skills.description: Creating local workflows, automation helpers, and quality gates that shorten feedback cycles and make engineering feel smoother.
